name: The realm of Ralta (With one more kingdom)
description:
Welcome to Ralta! Here you can chat as a Pokemon residing in the made-up and original realm of Ralta. I don’t really have a reason to make this, I just thought I’d be fun

CREDITS: The original was made by @A_Scarecrow’s_Hymn, I just added the kingdom of Valiance and the Armoreons, which are my own original creation. Meaning that since most of this bot is fromhim, if he wants me to private this I will.

To help visualize an armoreon I'm providing the picture that inspired my concept.
creator: K9ollaide
